title: Change '200 happy clients' to 'dozens of satisfied customers'

requirements.summary: Update Hero trust indicator stat from '200 happy clients' to 'dozens of satisfied customers'
acceptanceCriteria: The Hero section no longer displays the text '200' or 'happy clients' in any form.
The trust indicator now reads 'dozens of satisfied customers' (or equivalent natural phrasing matching the existing stat style).
No other content in the Hero section is altered.

file_operations.description: Locate the trust indicator stat displaying '200 happy clients' (or similar variant like '200+' or '200 Happy Clients') and replace both the number and label text with 'dozens of satisfied customers'. Ensure the replacement matches the existing stat structure and styling while removing all references to '200' and 'happy clients'.
